Title: Requires regulations fixing tuition rates for students once matriculated in a two or four-year program at any state-operated institution of the state university
Summary: Requires regulations fixing tuition rates for students once matriculated in a two or four-year program at any state-operated institution of the state university.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the education law, in relation to fixed tuition rates for students once matriculated in a two or four-year program at any state-operated institution of the state university
